targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', o.ts) AS time, AVG(o.mid_price_usdt) AS price, AVG(CASE WHEN (l.taker_buy_vol_icp + l.taker_sell_vol_icp) > 0 THEN l.taker_sell_vol_icp / (l.taker_buy_vol_icp + l.taker_sell_vol_icp) * 100 ELSE NULL END) AS sell_ratio, AVG(CASE WHEN lm.max_oi > 0 THEN l.open_interest_icp / lm.max_oi * 100 ELSE NULL END) AS oi_norm FROM ob_snapshots o LEFT JOIN liquidation_snapshots l ON date_trunc('hour', l.ts) = date_trunc('hour', o.ts) CROSS JOIN (SELECT MAX(open_interest_icp) AS max_oi FROM liquidation_snapshots WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') lm WHERE $__timeFilter(o.ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('hour', o.ts) AS time, AVG(CASE WHEN (l.taker_buy_vol_icp + l.taker_sell_vol_icp) > 0 THEN l.taker_sell_vol_icp / (l.taker_buy_vol_icp + l.taker_sell_vol_icp) * 100 ELSE NULL END) AS sell_ratio, AVG(CASE WHEN lm.max_oi > 0 THEN l.open_interest_icp / lm.max_oi * 100 ELSE NULL END) AS oi_norm FROM ob_snapshots o LEFT JOIN liquidation_snapshots l ON date_trunc('hour', l.ts) = date_trunc('hour', o.ts) CROSS JOIN (SELECT MAX(open_interest_icp) AS max_oi FROM liquidation_snapshots WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') lm WHERE $__timeFilter(o.ts) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
